turn off the item next to the sdah - 1 icon

336, 1440, 523], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "From all that dwell below the skies 
Let the Creator's praise arise; 
Let His almighty name be sung 
Through every land, by every tongue. 

Eternal are Thy mercies, Lord, 
Eternal truth attends Thy word; 
Thy praise shall sound from shore to shore, 
Till suns shall rise and set no more. 

Your lofty themes, ye mortals, bring, 
In songs of praise divinely sing; 
God's great salvation loud proclaim, 
And shout for joy His glorious name. 

In every land begin the song, 
To every land the strains belong; 
In cheerful sounds all voices raise, 
And fill the world with loudest praise.", "resource-id": "com.tinashe.sdah:id/hym_text", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "22ce617", "scrollable-horizontal": false, "ancestors": false}, {"text": "Before Jehovah's awful throne, 
Ye nations, bow with sacred joy; 
Know that the Lord is God alone; 
He can create, and He destroy. 

His sovereign power, without our aid, 
Made us of clay, and formed us men; 
And when like wandering sheep we strayed, 
He brought us to His fold again. 

We'll crowd His gates with thankful songs, 
High as the heavens our voices raise; 
And earth, with her ten thousand tongues, 
Shall fill His courts with sounding praise. 

Wide as the world is His command, 
Vast as Eternity His love; 
Firm as a rock His truth shall stand, 
When rolling years shall cease to move.", "resource-id": "com.tinashe.sdah:id/hym_text", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "80fccb3", "scrollable-horizontal": false, "ancestors":
